name: check_docker
description: Check if Docker is installed and running

name: detect_hardware
description: Scan for USB Zigbee coordinators

name: deploy_service
description: Start a Docker Compose service. Use 'homeassistant', 'whisper', or 'piper'.

service_name.description: Service to deploy: homeassistant, whisper, or piper

name: check_service_health
description: Check health of running services

service_name.description: Specific service to check, or omit for all

name: generate_ha_token
description: Create HA admin user and get long-lived API token. Only works on first run.

name: discover_devices
description: Scan for new devices on the network

name: list_devices
description: List all registered devices, optionally filtered by area

name: start_config_flow
description: Begin setting up a device integration. Returns what info is needed.

name: continue_config_flow
description: Continue a device setup flow with user-provided info

user_input.description: Key-value pairs for the current setup step

name: list_areas
description: List all rooms/areas in the home

name: create_area
description: Create a new room/area

name: assign_device_to_area
description: Assign a device to a room

name: list_entities
description: List all entities (devices/sensors), optionally filtered by domain or area

domain.description: Filter by type: light, sensor, switch, climate, lock, etc.

name: get_entity_state
description: Get the current state and attributes of a specific entity

name: call_service
description: Control a device by calling a Home Assistant service

domain.description: Service domain: light, switch, climate, lock, etc.

service.description: Service name: turn_on, turn_off, toggle, set_temperature, lock, unlock

name: get_history
description: Get state history for an entity over the past N hours

name: health_check
description: Check health of all NanoHA services (HA, Whisper, Piper, Docker)

name: get_config
description: Get Home Assistant configuration summary (version, components, location)

name: list_automations
description: List all automations with their current state (on/off) and last triggered time

name: trigger_automation
description: Manually trigger an automation

name: enable_automation
description: Enable a disabled automation

name: disable_automation
description: Disable an automation

name: reload_automations
description: Reload all automations from configuration files

name: check_anomalies
description: Check for anomalous states: open doors/windows, motion at night, low battery devices

hours.description: How many hours back to check

name: watch_events
description: Subscribe to real-time HA events for a duration. Returns collected events.

event_type.description: Filter to event type, e.g. 'state_changed'. Omit for all.

name: configure_google_cloud_stt
description: Set up Google Cloud Speech-to-Text in Home Assistant for higher quality voice recognition

api_key.description: Google Cloud API key. If omitted, reads GOOGLE_CLOUD_API_KEY env.
